original: It wouldn’t be a problem if you did. You’re an adult, and damn near every alien you meet wants to screw. You might as well enjoy it.
How could a hat make you any more of a bimbo? Like, who cares about smarts and stuff when there’s sex to be had. Warm... wet... hot... sticky... SEX.
A giggle slips out of your lips as you decide to act like a total bimbo for a while. What harm could there be in embracing your slutty side?

Your fingers tremble... No! Temptation or not, there’s like, other things to do besides sex that you haven’t been thinking about. You firmly grasp the sluttifying garment in both hands and yank it off, wishing it was someone else’s bra you were pulling off.

That’s just a passing fancy, of course. There’s all kinds of sexy clothes you could peel off... or put on. Dressing comfortably has its own appeal. You look longing at the garment held in your hands, part of you longing to sink back into depravity, but not right now.

Maybe it wouldn’t be so bad to wear it a bit longer? Yeah.... You lower your hands. There’s so much more fun to be had, so many people to bang, and so many cocks that you could suck! The party doesn’t need to end just yet. You can always take it off later, when you’re feeling a little more strong-willed.

It fits like any other hat. The effects - if it really has any at all - are so subtle that you really don’t even notice them. You don’t like, obsess about dicks or pussies, or offering your mouth to strangers on the street just because of some headwear!

You reach up for the hat and pause. Do you really want to do this? Do you really want to put an end to being a giggly, silly mess? It’s fun, and it’s not like it’s holding you back from exploring, right? Sex opens doors!
